title: Nursery Rhyme. LXXXIII. Proverbs.
content:
[Hours of sleep.]

        Nature requires five,
            Custom gives seven!
        Laziness takes nine,
            And Wickedness eleven.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. LXXXIII. Proverbs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
